finding_results.notes: Boundary terms are preserved while cadence is de-mechanized: June now delivers boundaries in colloquial pressure rhythm, and Eli responds with broken/self-revising syntax instead of mirrored policy acknowledgments. The exchange avoids three-line runs of conditional-policy delivery by alternating leverage and emotional response beats.

summary: Revised the boundary negotiation exchange for stronger voice separation and pressure-true cadence while preserving all required terms (weekly Monday call at 8:30, pre-miss text, no surprise visits, transparent monthly money updates on the second, semester pause after two missed calls, finals cutoff after unannounced visit, Theo copied if updates get vague).
